name: Shepherd's Pie Nov. 87
recipeInstructions:
1. Grind roast beef.
2. Brown meat in butter and oil.
3. Stir in onion and garlic, cooking until the onion begins to change color.
4. Add mushrooms and cook until liquid has evaporated.
5. Season with salt and pepper.
6. Add cognac and cook over high heat until it evaporates.
7. Add wine and cook until wine has evaporated.
8. Stir in tomato, broth, and thyme. Bring to a boil and simmer covered for 1 1/2 hours, adding more broth if needed.
9. Stir in Worcestershire sauce and cook for 10 minutes. Set aside.
10. Prepare potatoes:
11. Cook potatoes with their skins on. Let cool slightly.
12. Peel the potatoes, mash them, adding butter, milk, salt, pepper, and nutmeg.
13. Place the prepared meat in a baking dish.
14. Spread the mashed potatoes on top.
15. Brush the top with egg yolk.
16. Bake at 350°F for half an hour or until the top is golden.
